description: Base JavaScript rules derived from common_rules.md and nodejs_express_rules.md

rules.name: no_console_statements
rules.description: console.log/warn/error should be removed before pushing to avoid leaking data
rules.message: console statement found. Remove before pushing or replace with a structured logger.
rules.fix_suggestion: Delete the console call or use a logger (winston, pino, etc.).

rules.name: no_var_declarations
rules.description: var is function-scoped and hoisted — prefer const/let
rules.fix_suggestion: Replace 'var' with 'const' if the binding is never reassigned, otherwise 'let'.

rules.name: use_strict_equality
rules.description: Use === and !== instead of == and != to avoid type coercion bugs
rules.message: Loose equality (== or !=) detected. Use === or !== for strict comparison.

rules.name: no_hardcoded_secrets_js
rules.message: Hardcoded secret or API key detected in JS/TS source.
rules.fix_suggestion: Move to process.env.KEY or import from a config/constants file that reads from env.

rules.name: double_quotes_strings
rules.description: Use double quotes for string literals per team standard
rules.message: Single-quoted string found. Use double quotes consistently.
rules.fix_suggestion: Replace single quotes with double quotes: 'foo' → "foo".
rules.comment: Disabled by default — team may prefer single quotes. Enable if your ESLint enforces double.

rules.name: semicolons_required
rules.message: Missing semicolon at end of statement.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add a semicolon at the end of the statement.
rules.comment: Disabled by default — ASI makes this complex to detect with regex. Use ESLint instead.

rules.name: async_await_over_then
rules.description: Prefer async/await over raw .then() chains for readability
rules.message: Promise .then() chain found. Prefer async/await for better readability.
rules.fix_suggestion: Refactor to use async/await: const result = await somePromise();
